name: antigravity-kit
description: Disciplined agent pipeline for Antigravity: plan -> work -> loop -> review, protective hooks, and RTK/Headroom token optimization.
author: antigravity-kit contributors

interface.shortDescription: Kit workflow cycle (plan/work/loop/review), safety hooks, sequential-thinking, and token hygiene for Antigravity.
defaultPrompt: kit-review inspect the diff before shipping
kit-clean remove AI slop from this diff
kit-debug reproduce and fix this failure
kit-goal turn this brief into a completion checklist
